title: Bend Your Ear To Me

sections.label: Intro
lines: "Lord, hear my plea (oh, hear me)
Bend Your ear to my trembling voice."

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: "I am broken, weak, and low,
A heart that aches where shadows grow.
Your mercy, endless as the sea,
Rescue my soul, oh set me free."

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: "In my sorrow, I call Your name,
Through the ashes, I seek Your flame."

sections.label: Chorus
lines: "Bow down, O Lord, hear me cry,
You’re the lifeline as the waves rise high.
In my darkness, let Your light shine,
Your grace, eternal, forever mine."

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: "You are good, Your love remains,
A shelter strong through storms and rain.
To You I lift my weary gaze,
Oh, let me rest in Your embrace."

sections.label: Bridge
lines: "Teach me Your way, I’ll walk Your truth,
Bind my heart, let it not undo.
Your love alone can make me whole,
Your name the anchor of my soul."

sections.label: Chorus
lines: "Bow down, O Lord, hear me cry,
You’re the lifeline as the waves rise high.
In my darkness, let Your light shine,
Your grace, eternal, forever mine."

sections.label: Outro
lines: "Lord, hear my plea (oh, hear me),
Bend Your ear to my trembling voice..."

epigraph: and plenteous in mercy unto all them that call upon thee
